column15: Explore Winchester Cathedral, Great Hall with Round Table, River Itchen. Check in early afternoon if possible.
St Catherine's Hill views, Beacon Hill NNR (201m, wildflowers & butterflies), cross River Meon. Milburys is ON the trail.
Old Winchester Hill (Iron Age fort), Butser Hill 270m (HIGHEST point on trail), Queen Elizabeth Country Park. Five Bells excellent food.
Harting Down (fantastic views to North Downs), Devil's Jumps (Bronze Age barrows), woodland sections. A286 crossing - bail-out point.
Bignor Hill, optional visit Bignor Roman Villa (1.5mi off trail). Amberley village is VERY pretty. Amberley Station on route - train bail-out.
Chanctonbury Ring (Iron Age hillfort, said to be haunted!), Washington village, River Adur crossing. Good facilities in Steyning.
DEVIL'S DYKE (major highlight - 360° views!), Jack & Jill windmills, Ditchling Beacon option. ON the South Downs Way.
Pyecombe to Brighton: 15 min by bus/taxi (6 miles). Celebrate! Explore Brighton seafront, North Laine, pubs, restaurants.

column14: Optional 2nd rest night. Visit Royal Pavilion, beach, shopping, restaurants. Or do a day walk to Devil's Dyke if you bypassed it.

column15: Brighton to Bristol Temple Meads ~3hrs (change Reading/Bath). Bristol TM to Bradford-on-Avon ~15min.
